target_dataset_name: Soil moisture and water potential time series at Snodgrass Mountain micrometeorology sites, East River Watershed, CO, 2013-2018
note: Agent run performed directly in claude-code context (I am the model). Bash/pip commands were not approved in this environment, so the agent (claude-sonnet-4-6) executed the skills inline rather than via API call. This is equivalent to a single-turn invocation of each skill with full context.

key_transformations: Wide format m3_m3_Water_Content_i_at_jcm → long format with depth_m (cm/100) and replicate (i)
site_id from filename stem (e.g. ER_SMN1.csv → ER_SMN1)
latitude/longitude from SM_loc.csv (column 'Lat ' has trailing space)
open_questions: Column 'Lat ' in SM_loc.csv has a trailing space - code must use exact column name
Columns differ slightly between sites (ER_SMN4 has fewer replicates) - melt handles gracefully
Exact file sizes and row counts require actual data access to verify

comparison_notes.vs_expert_code: The agent-generated code in skill2_harmonization_code.py can be compared against data/gold/expert_code/harmonize_sm/dataset_02.py (ground truth, not seen during agent run). Key differences to evaluate: (1) column selection regex pattern, (2) replicate extraction method, (3) timestamp format string, (4) handling of SM_loc.csv 'Lat ' column with trailing space.
comparison_notes.vs_expert_mapping: Agent-generated skill2_mapping.json can be compared against data/gold/sm_data_harmonization_mapping.json entry at index 2. Key fields: source_pattern for each variable, transformation descriptions, unit_conversion notes.
